claim_text: Excess early-season nitrogen increases lodging risk

value.raw_value_text: Excess nitrogen applied early in the season can lead to lodging problems or excess nitrate leaching in some areas and should be approached with caution on fields with a history of lodging.
value.text_value: Excess early-season nitrogen increases lodging risk
